description_long: This is a medium-sized bottle with a rounded body and a narrow neck, topped with a yellowish cap. The bottle is predominantly covered in a faded red and white label, which appears to be partially worn and difficult to read, but includes some visible branding and text. The surface of the bottle shows signs of wear, with some areas appearing smudged or discolored, suggesting it has been handled or exposed to the elements. The cap is a solid color and seems to be a screw type, fitting snugly on the neck. The bottle's material appears to be plastic, with a matte finish and no clear transparency, making it difficult to see the contents inside. Overall, the bottle looks like a typical beverage or condiment container that might be found discarded or in use in an urban environment.
description: A worn, red-and-white plastic bottle with a yellow screw cap and faded labeling, showing signs of use and surface wear.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main label with branding and text, most of the red and white design is visible.
description_view_1: Side view reveals more of the faded red coloration and less of the label, with some smudging and discoloration.
description_view_2: Back view displays mostly the red surface with a small, less detailed label and more visible wear.
description_view_3: Angled view shows the label wrapping around the bottle and the yellow cap, with some label text partially visible.
attribute_label_or_branding: Faded red and white label with some branding and text, partially legible, located on the front and wrapping around the body.
attribute_damage_or_deformation: Surface wear, smudging, and discoloration visible on the label and bottle body.
